title: First Steps Pack Of Four Baby Wash Cloths#2c
description: This pack of four baby wipes is an essential item for any baby collection, it is made from a soft and delicate polyester material and is available in two assorted colors, leaving babies skin clean and soft. Find more high-quality baby products in the First Steps range from RSW.
